tasks.name: Network Topology Manager and Config
tasks.description: Create NetworkTopologyManager class with collapsed/realistic mode support. Add NetworkConfig, ClockDriftConfig, ScanCycleConfig, ConnectionLimitConfig, ConnectionDropConfig Pydantic models. Topology resolves port mappings per profile (packaging: 4 Modbus + 1 OPC-UA; F&B: 7 Modbus + 2 OPC-UA). Update both YAML configs with network section.

tasks.name: Multi-Port Modbus Servers
tasks.description: Wire topology manager into DataEngine to spawn per-controller Modbus servers in realistic mode. Each server serves only its register range (out-of-range = 0x02). CDAB byte order on mixer. Connection limit enforcement. Response latency injection. Multi-slave UID routing on shared ports (oven gateway UIDs 1/2/3/10, press port UID 1 + energy UID 5).

tasks.name: Multi-Port OPC-UA Servers and Clock Drift
tasks.description: Wire topology manager for OPC-UA servers (packaging: 1 server; F&B: 2 servers on ports 4841/4842). Implement ClockDriftModel: drifted_time = sim_time + initial_offset + drift_rate * elapsed_hours/24. Apply to OPC-UA SourceTimestamp and MQTT JSON timestamps. Ground truth always uses true sim_time.

tasks.name: Scan Cycle Quantisation and Phase Jitter
tasks.description: Implement ScanCycleModel: values snap to last scan cycle output between boundaries. actual_cycle = cycle_ms * (1.0 + uniform(0, jitter_pct)). Per-controller: S7-1500 10ms/5%, S7-1200 20ms/8%, CompactLogix 15ms/6%, Eurotherm 100ms/10%, Danfoss 100ms/10%. Wire into Modbus server sync_registers() in realistic mode. Collapsed mode: no quantisation.

tasks.name: Independent Connection Drops per Controller
tasks.description: In realistic mode, each controller endpoint gets its own CommDropScheduler with controller-specific MTBF (Eurotherm 8-24h, S7-1500 72h+, etc). One controller dropping does not affect others. Reuse Phase 4 CommDropScheduler. Collapsed mode keeps existing single-drop-per-protocol behaviour.

tasks.name: Evaluation Framework: Core Engine
tasks.description: Event-level anomaly detection evaluation per PRD Section 12. Load ground truth JSONL, load detection alerts CSV, match events with tolerance windows (pre_margin 30s, post_margin 60s). Compute precision, recall, F1, weighted variants, detection latency (median, p90), random baseline. Per-scenario breakdown. Severity weights from PRD 12.4.

tasks.name: Evaluation CLI and Run Manifests
tasks.description: CLI evaluate subcommand, run manifest YAML (config, seed, profile, duration, version, git hash), clean/impaired pairing config helpers, example evaluation configs for Run A/B/C from PRD 12.5, multi-seed evaluation with confidence intervals.

tasks.name: Batch Output: CSV and Parquet
tasks.description: BatchWriter ABC with CsvWriter and ParquetWriter. CSV: timestamp, signal_id, value, quality. Parquet: columnar per-signal layout. Event-driven signals (machine_state, fault_code) written only on change with changed flag. Periodic flush (10k row buffer). Wire into DataEngine when time_scale > 10.

tasks.name: CLI Entry Point
tasks.description: argparse CLI with subcommands: run, evaluate, version. Flags: --config, --profile, --seed, --time-scale, --batch-output, --batch-duration, --batch-format, --network-mode, --log-level, --version. Entry point in pyproject.toml. __main__.py for python -m factory_simulator.

tasks.name: Docker Compose with Health Checks
tasks.description: Dockerfile (python:3.12-slim), docker-compose.yaml with Mosquitto sidecar + simulator, health checks, port mappings, env var overrides. docker-compose.realistic.yaml override for realistic mode ports. Health endpoint (GET /health, GET /status) on port 8080. config/mosquitto.conf.

tasks.name: README and Example Configs
tasks.description: Quick start guide (clone, docker compose up, verify data within 15 min). Architecture overview. Two profiles. Protocol endpoints. Config reference. Batch mode. Evaluation framework. Dev setup. Example CollatrEdge configs (packaging, F&B, realistic). Example evaluation configs (Run A/B/C).

tasks.name: Performance Profiling
tasks.description: Performance benchmarks: both profiles at 10x (tick latency mean/p95/p99), both profiles at 100x batch (wall time, ticks/sec), realistic mode overhead at 10x, 7-day memory stability. Marked @pytest.mark.performance. Results to performance-results.json.

tasks.name: Final Acceptance Test and CI Pipeline
tasks.description: Acceptance tests verifying PRD Section 11 criteria: both profiles 24h collapsed, realistic topology port verification, controller independence (one drop doesn't affect others), evaluation framework end-to-end, batch CSV/Parquet output, CLI --help, clock drift visibility. CI pipeline (.github/workflows/ci.yml). Marked @pytest.mark.acceptance.
